use_cases: Hero section headline with animated gradient text effect for SaaS landing pages
Feature or product section titles with eye-catching typography
Marketing pages requiring modern, animated text presentations
ai_summary: An animated gradient text component that displays multi-line typography with color-shifting animations. The component features words like 'Develop.', 'Preview.', and 'Ship.' with moving gradient backgrounds and foregrounds, creating a dynamic visual effect. It includes decorative Plus icons at corners and supports dark mode, making it ideal for hero sections in SaaS and developer tool applications.
